name: google-tasks-mcp
description: A private, context-efficient MCP server for Google Tasks.
long_description: Connect MCP-compatible clients to a Google Tasks account through compact read/write tools. Each user runs their own instance and provides their own Google OAuth credentials.

tools.name: get_tasklist
tools.description: Read one Google tasklist by ID or exact title.

tools.name: update_tasklist
tools.description: Rename a Google tasklist by ID.

tools.name: delete_tasklist
tools.description: Delete a Google tasklist by ID after confirmation.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks with Google Tasks filters.

tools.name: clear_completed
tools.description: Hide completed tasks in a tasklist after confirmation.

tools.name: move
tools.description: Move a task to another tasklist.

google_client_id.title: Google OAuth Client ID
google_client_id.description: OAuth client ID from your Google Cloud project.

google_client_secret.title: Google OAuth Client Secret
google_client_secret.description: OAuth client secret from your Google Cloud project.

google_redirect_uri.title: Google Redirect URI
google_redirect_uri.description: OAuth callback URL for this local or hosted server.

db_path.title: SQLite DB Path
db_path.description: Path for the OAuth token and tasklist cache database.

default_tasklist.title: Default Tasklist
default_tasklist.description: Optional Google tasklist title or ID to use when a tool omits tasklist.
